Decompiling Alpine Image...
Alpine Linux
Starting...

Packages cant be installed because this VM doesnt have wifi.

Test C/GCC

cat > hello.c <<'EOF'
#include <stdio.h>
int main(void) {
    puts("hello from C");
    return 0;
}
EOF

gcc hello.c -o hello
./hello

Test Python

python3 --version
pip3 --version

python3 -m venv .venv
source .venv/bin/activate

Cache

This version does not save VM state. It only caches the decompressed Alpine image locally so later loads are faster.

Notes

Login:
user: root
password: linux1234?

Submit a form to request apps.

Installed apps:

GCC

Python3 and PIP
